abort.no_devices_found: No Comet Blue Bluetooth TRVs discovered.

get_schedule.description: Retrieves the configured heating time ranges of one or multiple devices.
get_schedule.name: Get schedule

set_schedule.description: Sets the configured heating time ranges of one or multiple devices. Days not included in the service call will be left unchanged.

friday.description: Heating time periods for Friday. Up to 4 heat times can be set.
friday.name: [%key:common::time::friday%]

sunday.description: Heating time periods for Sunday. Up to 4 heat times can be set.

thursday.description: Heating time periods for Thursday. Up to 4 heat times can be set.

tuesday.description: Heating time periods for Tuesday. Up to 4 heat times can be set.
